# mapbox_style (Data Source)

Use this data source to read information about an existing Mapbox style.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "mapbox_style" "example" {
  id = "cj3kbeqzo00052rp1pklhzqwu"
}

output "style_name" {
  value = data.mapbox_style.example.name
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the style to look up.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the style was created.
- `draft` (Boolean) Whether the style has unpublished changes.
- `glyphs` (String) The font glyphs URL.
- `layers` (String) A JSON string defining the map layers.
- `metadata` (String) A JSON string containing arbitrary style metadata.
- `modified` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the style was last modified.
- `name` (String) The name of the style.
- `owner` (String) The username of the style owner.
- `protected` (Boolean) Whether the style is protected from editing.
- `sources` (String) A JSON string defining the map data sources.
- `sprite` (String) The sprite URL.
- `version` (Number) The Mapbox style specification version.
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the style: `public` or `private`.
